title: My AI Memory Now Follows Me Across Every Tool!
summary: Walrus Memory is a memory layer that operates outside individual AI agents, allowing persistent context to be shared across different AI tools and providers. It uses encryption and user-owned keys to store and retrieve agent memories, enabling seamless transitions between Claude, Codex, Pi, and other AI systems.
